headline: T-Mobile Stock Falls on Report of Possible Deutsche Telekom Combination
summary: Deutsche Telekom  is weighing a merger with  T-Mobile US  according to a report on Tuesday.  Shares of the German telecommunications provider were down 2.6% after the Bloomberg report, while shares of T-Mobile fell 0.7%.  Deutsche Telekom is a partner with T-Mobile and its largest shareholder, with 53% of the shares, according to FactSet.

headline: T-Mobile, Deutsche Telekom consider merger to create world’s largest telecom group
summary: Investing.com -- T-Mobile US Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) shares surged 3% Tuesday afternoon following a Bloomberg report that Deutsche Telekom AG is considering a full combination with its American subsidiary.

headline: Deutsche Telekom exploring merger with T-Mobile, Bloomberg News reports
summary: Deutsche Telekom is considering a full combination with T-Mobile US that could result in the largest public M&A deal on record, Bloomberg ‌News reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.  The German telecoms ‌group has been in talks about creating a new holding company that would make a stock bid for ​shares of both Deutsche Telekom and T-Mobile, the report said.  Deutsche Telekom is the majority shareholder in T-Mobile, with a stake of nearly 53%, according to LSEG data.
